claims.summary: Port 7878 telemetry should be decoded once and producer observation must remain immutable.

claims.summary: Temporal pressure history must be bounded and smoothing must remain visible.

claims.summary: Absent dynamic damping evidence must be reported as unknown rather than inferred.
claims.disposition: verify texture-integrity damping candidate status and advisory observability
